title: .NET Analyzer Options
description: Provides a set of options for an analyzer.

option.title: Analyzer Option
option.description: An option for customizing the behavior of one or more analyzer rules.

values.description: The option values that are available for use.

default.description: The default value that is used when the option is not specified.

optionValue.title: Analyzer Option Value
optionValue.description: A value that can be used for an analyzer option.

alternate.description: An alternate option value that can be used in place of the normal value.

specification.description: Additional specification about the value property. Used to provide context when many different values are possible.

description.description: An explanation of the resulting behavior after applying the selected value.
